mapper.select: SELECT p.id, p.name, p.category_id, p.unit, p.price, p.stock, p.sort, p.status, p.delivery_type, p.coupon_enabled, p.version, p.create_time, p.update_time, p.create_by, p.update_by, NULL AS image_url, md.common_name AS med_common_name, md.composition AS med_composition, md.characteristics AS med_characteristics, md.packaging AS med_packaging, md.validity_period AS med_validity_period, md.storage_conditions AS med_storage_conditions, md.production_unit AS med_production_unit, md.approval_number AS med_approval_number, md.executive_standard AS med_executive_standard, md.origin_type AS med_origin_type, md.is_outpatient_medicine AS med_is_outpatient_medicine, md.warm_tips AS med_warm_tips, md.brand AS med_brand, md.drug_category AS med_drug_category, md.efficacy AS med_efficacy, md.usage_method AS med_usage_method, md.adverse_reactions AS med_adverse_reactions, md.precautions AS med_precautions, md.taboo AS med_taboo, md.instruction AS med_instruction FROM mall_product p LEFT JOIN drug_detail md ON p.id = md.product_id AND (md.is_deleted IS NULL OR md.is_deleted = 0) WHERE (p.is_deleted IS NULL OR p.is_deleted = 0) AND p.id = #{id} ORDER BY p.id
